name: 1st Capital Semi Truck Title Loans
description_short: South Carolina-based title loan lender offering fast cash loans ($650-$9,999) secured by vehicle titles, including cars, motorcycles, semi trucks, and box trucks.
description_long:
1st Capital Semi Truck Title Loans operates multiple physical locations across South Carolina (Anderson, Clover, Fort Mill, Rock Hill, and Loris), specializing in secured title loans for both personal and commercial vehicles. The company does not operate online and requires borrowers to visit a physical location to complete the loan process.

2) The company offers title loans secured by clear vehicle titles, with loan amounts ranging from $650 to $9,999. Their standard advertised rate is 300% APR with a 12-month term. Loans can be obtained in approximately 25 minutes or less once the borrower is at a physical location. The company accepts car titles, motorcycle titles, semi truck titles, and box truck titles as collateral. They also charge a $15 lien recording fee forwarded to the Department of Motor Vehicles.

3) 1st Capital distinguishes itself by specializing in commercial vehicle title loans, including the niche market of 18-wheeler/semi truck title loans through a dedicated Fort Mill location. They maintain a no-prepayment-penalty policy, allowing borrowers to pay off loans early without additional charges. The company explicitly states it performs minimal credit checks and bases lending decisions primarily on vehicle value and condition. They maintain multiple physical locations for customer convenience in the South Carolina/North Carolina border region.

4) This is a high-cost lending product with a 300% APR rate significantly exceeding payday loan rates and well above federal rate caps for other consumer lending. Borrowers must physically visit an office to apply and receive funds—no online or mail-based loans are available. The company explicitly prohibits North Carolina residents from online applications, though physical visits may be permitted. This is appropriate only for emergency cash needs when other options are unavailable, as the extreme APR creates substantial repayment burden.
pros: Fast approval timeline: loans obtainable in 25 minutes or less once at physical location
No prepayment penalty: borrowers can pay off loans early without additional charges
Minimal credit checks required: lending decision based primarily on vehicle value and condition
Specialized commercial vehicle lending: dedicated services for semi trucks, box trucks, and motorcycles
Multiple South Carolina locations: six offices across the state for customer accessibility
Small minimum loan amount: loans available from as little as $650
Flexible collateral options: accepts cars, motorcycles, semi trucks, and box trucks
cons: Extremely high APR: 300% interest rate far exceeds typical payday loans and creates severe debt spiral risk
In-person only: no online or mail-based applications; requires physical office visit to complete transaction
Geographic limitations: serves South Carolina only; North Carolina residents explicitly excluded from online applications
Lien recording fee: additional $15 fee charged for DMV lien recording on top of interest costs
Loss of vehicle access risk: borrowers pledge vehicle titles as collateral, risking vehicle loss if unable to repay
best_for: Commercial vehicle operators (truck drivers, box truck owners) needing emergency cash collateralized by working vehicles
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or lines of credit
South Carolina residents in genuine emergency situations with no alternative funding options available
diagnosis: 1st Capital Semi Truck Title Loans is designed for South Carolina residents facing genuine emergencies who own vehicles with clear titles and cannot access traditional credit. The critical caveat is the 300% APR, which creates severe repayment burden and risk of vehicle loss—this product should only be considered as an absolute last resort when all other funding options are exhausted, and borrowers must fully understand they may lose their vehicle if unable to repay.
services: In-person loan applications at physical locations
Fast loan approval (25 minutes or less)
Multi-location loan origination across South Carolina
